description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that can be triggered manually. Run a single ubuntu-latest job with write permission to repository contents, but only if the workflow is triggered by a specific set of actors. The job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9, logs into the GitHub CLI, installs dependencies, bumps the version, builds a changelog, builds and validates bundles, uploads to PyPI, and then commits changes and publishes to GitHub.
